items.title: Senior Software Engineer - QRM | HYBRID - INSPECTORIO
items.description:
**About the role**

- As a Senior Software Engineer at Inspectorio, you will partner with Product, Design, QA, and Customer Support to solve complex business problems and deliver customer value. You will use modern engineering practices, including AI-assisted development where appropriate, while maintaining high standards for architecture, quality, security, and operational excellence. As such, we are open to hiring a Senior Software Engineer with either strong backend expertise in Python, or fullstack experience with a frontend focus in Angular alongside Python.
- Success in this role is defined not only by technical implementation, but by the ability to frame problems effectively, evaluate trade-offs, orchestrate solutions across systems and teams, and guide projects from concept to measurable business outcomes.

**What you'll do**

- Design, develop, and maintain high-performance backend services using Python and Django. 
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams, including designers, product managers, and other engineers, to deliver high-quality software solutions. 
- Lead problem discovery, root cause analysis, and solution framing for complex technical and business challenges.
- Translate ambiguous business requirements into well-defined technical solutions and execution plans.
- Drive decisions through data, experimentation, and rapid prototyping.
- Work closely with Customer Support and QA teams to investigate and resolve customer-reported incidents, bugs, and requests in a timely and professional manner. 
- Demonstrate strong communication and collaboration skills, participating actively in team discussions, planning sessions, and retrospectives. 
- Architect and implement new features and services that meet business requirements. 
- Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code adhering to best practices and industry standards. 
- Lead code reviews, provide constructive feedback, and mentor junior developers to enhance the team’s capabilities. 
- Identify, troubleshoot, and resolve performance bottlenecks and other backend issues. 
- Stay current with the latest industry trends, technologies, and best practices, particularly in Python and Django. 
- Optimize applications for maximum speed and scalability while ensuring security and data protection standards. 
- Contribute to the improvement of the development process, including continuous integration and deployment strategies.

**Qualifications**

- 5+ years of professional experience in backend development, with a strong emphasis on Python and Django. 
- Deep understanding of object-oriented programming, design patterns, and other OOP principles such as SOLID and GRASP. 
- Experience with RESTful APIs, API-first approach, and microservices architecture. 
- Proficient in working with relational databases such as PostgreSQL, MySQL, or similar. 
- Demonstrated ability to solve ambiguous problems and translate business objectives into scalable technical solutions.
- Strong systems-thinking mindset with the ability to reason across product, technical, operational, and customer domains.
- Experience using AI-assisted development tools responsibly to improve engineering productivity, including coding, testing, debugging, documentation, and solution design, while maintaining high standards for quality, security, and maintainability.
- Proven ability to evaluate competing solutions and make sound trade-off decisions under uncertainty.
- Excellent written communication skills, including the ability to produce high-quality technical designs, implementation plans, and architectural proposals.
- Experience with asynchronous programming and related frameworks like Celery. 
- Proficient with version control systems, particularly Git. 
- Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, Google Cloud) and their services. 
- Proven ability to work independently and within cross-functional teams. 
- Understanding of CI/CD pipelines, Docker, and container orchestration tools like Kubernetes 
- Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to work independently in a fast-paced environment. 
- Great communication skills, in English, both written and verbal. 

NICE TO HAVE

- Experience with Angular (v18+) and modern frontend development. 
- Ability to contribute across the fullstack (backend + frontend). 

**Benefits**

Why it would be awesome to work with us

🍹 Unlimited Annual Leave: We prioritize your well-being and trust you to manage your time.
🏝️ Flexible Working: Whether from home, a coffee shop, or our global hubs, work where you're most comfortable.
💪 Project Ownership: You get to lead  the initiatives you're passionate about, professionally or socially.
🌱 Grow with us: We're invested in your personal and professional development.
🌎 Global, diverse, and innovative team: Be part of a welcoming community from 30+ countries, where unique perspectives drive innovation.
🤝 Feel at home: Work closely with colleagues who value your voice, share our E.A.C.H. values, and help you be the best version of yourself.
🎉 Celebrate together: Enjoy remote and hub company and team  events that strengthen our bonds and build a fun culture.

Let's connect with me at +84395392802 for more information on hiring process and position expectation.

items.title: Senior Software Engineer - Core Service | HYBRID - INSPECTORIO
items.description:
**About the role**

As a Senior Software Engineer at Inspectorio, you will be responsible for working with cross-functional teams including product owners, designers, and quality assurance engineers to conceptualize, develop, and deploy software features that meet customer needs. Your initial focus will be on our core functionalities such as Organization & User Management, Authentication & Authorization, Billing & Subscription Management. 


**What you'll do**

- Design, develop, and maintain high-performance backend services using Python and its frameworks such as Django, FastAPI.
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams, including designers, product managers, and other engineers, to deliver high-quality software solutions.
- Work closely with Customer Support and QA teams to investigate and resolve customer-reported incidents, bugs, and requests in a timely and professional manner.
- Utilize AI agents and AI workflows to streamline development tasks and routine operations, from ideation to developing new features and root cause analysis.
- Demonstrate strong communication and collaboration skills, participating actively in team discussions, planning sessions, and retrospectives.
- Architect and implement new features and services that meet business requirements.
- Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code adhering to best practices and industry standards.
- Lead code reviews, provide constructive feedback, and mentor junior developers to enhance the team’s capabilities.
- Identify, troubleshoot, and resolve performance bottlenecks and other backend issues.
- Stay current with the latest industry trends, technologies, and best practices, particularly in AI utilization.
- Optimize applications for maximum speed and scalability while ensuring security and data protection standards.
- Contribute to the improvement of the development process, including continuous integration and deployment strategies.


**Qualifications**

- 5+ years of professional experience in backend development, with a strong emphasis on Python and its frameworks.
- Deep understanding of object-oriented programming, design patterns, and other OOP principles such as SOLID and GRASP.
- Experience with RESTful APIs, API-first approach, and microservices architecture.
- Proficient in working with both relational and non-relational databases such as PostgreSQL, ElasticSearch.
- Experience using AI assistants in the development workflow (e.g., Claude Code, Cursor, Antigravity).
- Experience with asynchronous programming and related frameworks like Celery.
- Proficient with version control systems, particularly Git.
- Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, Google Cloud) and their services.
- Proven ability to work independently and within cross-functional teams.
- Understanding of CI/CD pipelines, Docker, and container orchestration tools like Kubernetes
- Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to work independently in a fast-paced environment.
- Great communication skills, in English, both written and verbal.
- Experience in working with SaaS Billing systems is a plus.


**Benefits**

Why it would be awesome to work with us

🍹 Unlimited Annual Leave: We prioritize your well-being and trust you to manage your time.
🏝️ Flexible Working: Whether from home, a coffee shop, or our global hubs, work where you're most comfortable.
💪 Project Ownership: You get to lead  the initiatives you're passionate about, professionally or socially.
🌱 Grow with us: We're invested in your personal and professional development.
🌎 Global, diverse, and innovative team: Be part of a welcoming community from 30+ countries, where unique perspectives drive innovation.
🤝 Feel at home: Work closely with colleagues who value your voice, share our E.A.C.H. values, and help you be the best version of yourself.
🎉 Celebrate together: Enjoy remote and hub company and team  events that strengthen our bonds and build a fun culture.

Contact me at +84 395392802 for further information.

items.title: [Remoto] Desenvolvedor(a) Full-Stack Sênior (TypeScript/React/Node) - Grupo Apex (EUA)
items.description:
## Sobre nós

Grupo de três pequenas empresas americanas (Orlando, FL — dono brasileiro): revenda de carros
com DMS próprio (theapexauto.com), plataforma de investimento imobiliário e plataforma de
serviços de construção (riseconstruction.us). Os três produtos estão em produção, com clientes
reais e receita real.

## A vaga

Os três produtos foram construídos majoritariamente com agentes de IA (Claude Code). Você vai
trabalhar COM esses agentes — eles revisam seus PRs, você revisa os deles. Procuramos alguém
que use IA como alavanca e traga o que ela não traz: julgamento sênior sobre edge cases,
integridade de dados, migração segura e deploy sem susto. Os produtos estão ~80% prontos; o
trabalho é levá-los a 100% — a parte que separa produto de demo.

## O que você vai fazer

- Cutover de redesigns de staging para produção, incluindo migrações de schema manuais (MySQL)
- Features de dashboard: fluxos de financiamento, pipeline de ofertas com SLA, portais por
  papel (comprador/colaborador), chat interno, motores de orçamento e comissão
- Integrações: Stripe (go-live), QuickBooks two-way, telefonia (Twilio), APIs de terceiros
- Hardening: checagens multi-tenant, bugs de cálculo de folha (nível centavo), schema drift

## Stack (igual nos 3 produtos)

TypeScript, React, Vite, tRPC, Drizzle ORM, MySQL, Tailwind/Radix, Node.js em VPS Linux
(nginx), Cloudflare R2. Integrações: Stripe, Twilio, QuickBooks, APIs Meta/Google.

## Local

Remoto (Brasil) — PJ

## Requisitos

- **Experiência:** 5+ anos levando TypeScript full-stack a produção; React + Node + SQL
  profundos (o peso maior é backend)
- **Produção de verdade:** já operou app em Linux puro (nginx, systemd, SSH, backup) — sem
  rede de segurança de PaaS
- **Cicatriz de integração:** Stripe, OAuth, webhooks (inclusive entrega duplicada)
- **Inglês:** técnico de leitura/escrita (código e docs em inglês; dia a dia em português)
- **Perfil:** autonomia, conforto genuíno em revisar código escrito por IA e ser revisado
  por agentes
- **Diferencial forte:** React Native/Expo — temos 3 apps mobile (Expo Router) na fila
  depois da web, incluindo publicação nas lojas

## Contratação

PJ — **R$ 12.000 a R$ 18.000/mês**, conforme senioridade · full-time ou 30h+/semana
- Cliente americano direto (sem agência no meio), pagamento em dia via Deel, longo prazo
- Demo semanal · começa com **trial pago de 1 semana** (tarefa real do backlog, no seu rate)

## Como se candidatar

Email para **alex@theapexauto.com** com assunto **[FULLSTACK] Seu Nome** contendo:
1. A integração de produção mais cabeluda que você já entregou — o que quebrou e como descobriu
2. Links de código seu com histórico real de commits
3. Pretensão (R$/mês PJ) e disponibilidade

Propostas genéricas são descartadas. Sem agências, por favor.

items.title: Engenheiro(a) de Software Sênior — Python & AI Agentics | Brasil | Accenture
items.description:
### 🎯 Cargo

Engenheiro(a) de Software Sênior — Python & AI Agentics 

### 🏢 Empresa

Accenture

### 📊 Nível de Experiência

Especialista/Staff

### 🏠 Modalidade de Trabalho

Híbrido

### 📍 Localização

São Paulo - SP, Rio de Janeiro - RJ, Recife - PE, Fortaleza - CE, Campina Grande - PB ou Belém - PA

### 📝 Tipo de Contratação

CLT

### 💱 Moeda

BRL

### 💰 Faixa Salarial

_No response_

### 📋 Descrição da Vaga

Buscamos Especialistas, Consultores em Engenharia de Software para atuar no desenvolvimento de soluções backend, contribuindo para o desenho, construção e evolução de aplicações escaláveis e de alta qualidade. O profissional atuará de forma colaborativa com times técnicos e de negócio, participando de decisões de design, direcionamento técnico e boas práticas de engenharia. 

Principais responsabilidades:

- Desenvolver, manter e evoluir aplicações backend em ambientes produtivos
- Projetar e implementar soluções técnicas alinhadas aos requisitos do negócio
- Atuar na integração entre sistemas e componentes
- Garantir qualidade, performance, segurança e escalabilidade das soluções
- Contribuir para a evolução das práticas de engenharia e apoiar tecnicamente o time

### ✅ Requisitos Técnicos

```markdown
Stacks e conhecimentos esperados:
Desenvolvimento backend com Java ou Python
Criação e consumo de APIs REST
Bancos de dados relacionais (Postgres, MySQL)
Fundamentos sólidos de engenharia de software (design, clean code, code review, debugging)
Testes automatizados
Noções de sistemas distribuídos e mensageria
Conceitos básicos de segurança (OAuth, JWT, gestão de segredos)
Inglês intermediário/avançado.

Diferenciais:
Conhecimento em AI Agents e integração de soluções inteligentes
Experiência em ambientes cloud (AWS, Azure ou GCP)
Vivência com metodologias ágeis
```

### 🎁 Benefícios

Benefícios:
Plano de saúde - Extensivo aos dependentes
Plano odontológico - Extensivo aos dependentes*
Seguro de vida
Previdência Privada 
VR (valor é associado à região) *
VT / Aux. Estacionamento / Aux Fretado (presenciais) *
Wellhub (antigo Gympass*)
Plano de carreira*
PPR
etc.

_Buscamos perfis que estejam alinhados aos valores da empresa, entusiastas em trabalhar em um ambiente colaborativo e dinâmico, com excelência na entrega e inovação presentes em seu dia a dia.

Valorizamos competências independentemente de raça, idade, gênero, orientação sexual, credo, deficiência e convicção política. A diversidade das nossas pessoas é o que nos permite cumprir a promessa da tecnologia e da criatividade humana.

Reconhecemos as características únicas dos indivíduos, respeitamos as diferenças e investimos em um ambiente cada vez mais inclusivo._

### 🛠️ Stack/Tecnologias

- Linguagens:Python
- IA: LLMs, AI Agents e integração de soluções inteligentes
- APIs: Criação e consumo de APIs REST
- Bancos de dados: PostgreSQL, MySQL
- Testes:Testes automatizados
- Arquitetura: Sistemas distribuídos, mensageria
- Segurança: OAuth, JWT, gestão de segredos

Diferenciais:
- Cloud: AWS, Azure ou GCP
- Metodologias ágeis

### 📧 Como se Candidatar

Candidate-se pelo link: https://accenture.wd103.myworkdayjobs.com/AccentureCareers/job/Sao-Paulo-Torre-Paineira/Engenheiro-a--de-Software-Backend_R00307149

### 🔗 Link da Vaga (opcional)

https://accenture.wd103.myworkdayjobs.com/AccentureCareers/job/Sao-Paulo-Torre-Paineira/Engenheiro-a--de-Software-Backend_R00307149

### ✔️ Confirmação

- [x] Esta é uma vaga real e ativa
- [x] Li e concordo com as regras do repositório
- [x] A vaga é relacionada à área de DevOps/SRE/Cloud/Infraestrutura

items.title: [Remoto] Front-end Vue.js Developer Pleno @ Sylision
items.description:
## Descrição da vaga

Vaga de Front-end Vue.js Developer nível Pleno para atuar em projetos de empresas parceiras da Sylision.

Faixa salarial: R$ 7.000 a R$ 12.000/mês, conforme experiência.

## Local

100% remoto, de qualquer lugar do Brasil ou de Portugal.

## Benefícios

- Faixa salarial transparente (R$ 7.000–12.000/mês)
- Benefícios variam conforme a empresa contratante (detalhados na conversa com o headhunter)

## Requisitos

**Obrigatórios:**
- Experiência sólida com Vue.js compatível com o nível Pleno
- Boas práticas de engenharia: versionamento, testes e code review

## Como se candidatar

Basta enviar o CV uma vez — a IA da Sylision considera seu perfil para esta e para todas as vagas compatíveis, inclusive as que abrirem depois.

items.title: Review PR #1102 — Remote Signal API (JSON jobs + Show HN feed)
items.description:
**Merge request — Remote Signal API listing**

PR adds a JSON API for recruiting teams: 50 RemoteOK dev/SaaS jobs + 20 HN Show HN posts (15min cache).

- Live: https://intellectual-close-wages-west.trycloudflare.com/pricing
- Free: 10 req/day | Pro: $5 USDC/mo | Agents: x402 $0.02/req on Base
- Docs: https://gist.github.com/reckoning89/d87818b2020bbc27590df1fa0c42f175
- Verified: 138+ API calls from 40+ external IPs this week

Happy to adjust copy/format. Ready to merge when convenient — thanks for maintaining this list!
